case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. VERONICA HICKS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2013 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHWLL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
